mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_win_record WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} ORDER BY win_time DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_win_record WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} ORDER BY win_time DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_win_record WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY win_time ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_win_record SET status = #{status}, grant_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pw_win_record WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} AND campaign_id = #{campaignId}
